mapper.select:
SELECT tb.task_book_id, tb.student_id, u.real_name AS student_name, u.student_no, tb.topic_id, t.topic_name, tb.teacher_id, tu.real_name AS teacher_name, tb.content, tb.document_id, d.file_name AS document_name, tb.create_time, tb.update_time FROM opening_task_book tb LEFT JOIN user_info u ON tb.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON tb.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN user_info tu ON tb.teacher_id = tu.user_id LEFT JOIN document_info d ON tb.document_id = d.document_id WHERE tb.is_deleted = 0
AND u.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%')
ORDER BY tb.create_time DESC

SELECT tb.task_book_id, tb.student_id, u.real_name AS student_name, u.student_no, tb.topic_id, t.topic_name, tb.teacher_id, tu.real_name AS teacher_name, tb.content, tb.document_id, d.file_name AS document_name, tb.create_time, tb.update_time FROM opening_task_book tb LEFT JOIN user_info u ON tb.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON tb.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN user_info tu ON tb.teacher_id = tu.user_id LEFT JOIN document_info d ON tb.document_id = d.document_id WHERE tb.is_deleted = 0 AND tb.task_book_id = #{taskBookId}

SELECT tb.task_book_id, tb.student_id, u.real_name AS student_name, u.student_no, tb.topic_id, t.topic_name, tb.teacher_id, tu.real_name AS teacher_name, tb.content, tb.document_id, d.file_name AS document_name, tb.create_time, tb.update_time FROM opening_task_book tb LEFT JOIN user_info u ON tb.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_info t ON tb.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN user_info tu ON tb.teacher_id = tu.user_id LEFT JOIN document_info d ON tb.document_id = d.document_id WHERE tb.is_deleted = 0 AND tb.student_id = #{studentId}
